inputs.label: Number of AGV/AMR Vehicles
inputs.businessContext: Total number of autonomous vehicles deployed. Based on fleet sizing principles.

inputs.label: Purchase Price per Vehicle
inputs.businessContext: Initial capital expenditure per unit. Includes hardware, sensors, and base software.

inputs.label: Annual Maintenance Cost per Vehicle
inputs.businessContext: Yearly maintenance including parts, labor, and software updates. Based on OEM recommendations.

inputs.label: Annual Energy Cost per Vehicle
inputs.businessContext: Electricity or fuel cost for charging/refueling. Depends on usage hours and local rates.

inputs.label: Operator Labor Cost per Hour (if manual)
inputs.businessContext: Hourly wage for human operator if manual alternative. Used for comparison.

inputs.label: Manual Operation Hours per Day
inputs.businessContext: Hours per day a human operator would work. Typically 8-hour shifts.

inputs.label: Automated Operation Hours per Day
inputs.businessContext: Hours per day AGV/AMR can operate (with charging breaks). Often 16-20 hours.

inputs.label: Operating Days per Year
inputs.businessContext: Number of days the system operates annually. Typical manufacturing: 300 days.

inputs.label: System Lifespan (Years)
inputs.businessContext: Expected useful life of AGV/AMR before major overhaul or replacement. Typically 5-10 years.

inputs.label: Discount Rate (%)
inputs.businessContext: Annual discount rate for NPV calculation. Reflects cost of capital or hurdle rate.

inputs.label: Productivity Improvement (%)
inputs.businessContext: Expected throughput increase due to automation. Based on industry benchmarks (e.g., 15-30%).

inputs.label: Error Reduction (%)
inputs.businessContext: Reduction in material handling errors. AGV/AMR can reduce errors by 80-99%.

inputs.label: Safety Incident Reduction (%)
inputs.businessContext: Expected reduction in workplace injuries. Automation reduces human-vehicle interactions.

inputs.label: Cost of Capital (%)
inputs.businessContext: Weighted average cost of capital for investment analysis.

inputs.label: Inflation Rate (%)
inputs.businessContext: Expected annual inflation for future cost adjustments.

inputs.label: Data Confidence Level
inputs.businessContext: User's confidence in input data accuracy. Affects adjustment factor.

rules: All numeric inputs must be finite and non-negative.
automatedOperationHoursPerDay must be >= manualOperationHoursPerDay if comparing.
discountRate and costOfCapital must be between 0 and 100.
productivityImprovementPercent, errorReductionPercent, safetyIncidentReductionPercent must be between 0 and 100.
If dataConfidence is 'low', apply a 20% penalty to benefits.

hiddenLossDrivers: If annualNetCashFlow < 0: 'Negative cash flow indicates potential loss.'
If paybackPeriod > systemLifespanYears: 'Payback period exceeds system lifespan.'
If variancePercent > 20: 'High variance from manual baseline.'
suggestedActions: If roi < 0: 'Consider reducing purchase price or increasing utilization.'
If paybackPeriod > 3: 'Explore leasing options or government incentives.'
If dataConfidence is low: 'Gather more accurate operational data.'
